frontend.indicator: Socket.IO emit() calls successful but no backend acknowledgment
frontend.evidence: Console shows 'Message sent successfully' but backend never receives

frontend.indicator: Connection status shows 'connected' but no data flow
frontend.evidence: Frontend connection event fires, backend connection established, but no message routing

frontend.indicator: Extensive debugging output shows events firing but no response
frontend.evidence: onData events fire, WebSocket shows connected, emit appears successful

backend.indicator: WebSocket connections established but message handlers never triggered
backend.evidence: Connection logs show establishment but no 'handleMessage' calls

backend.indicator: PTY process spawns successfully but receives no input
backend.evidence: Shell process running but no commands forwarded

backend.indicator: WebSocket message parsing expects JSON but receives Socket.IO protocol
backend.evidence: Parser fails on Socket.IO Engine.IO protocol format

transport.evidence: TCP socket connected but application protocol incompatible

transport.indicator: HTTP upgrade to WebSocket successful but protocol negotiation fails
transport.evidence: Raw WebSocket vs Socket.IO protocol mismatch

step2.evidence: handleData function logs show input capture

step3.process: Frontend formats message and emits via Socket.IO

step4.process: Transport layer carries message to backend
step4.evidence: TCP connection ESTABLISHED, no network errors

step5.process: Backend WebSocket receives and parses message
step5.evidence: Raw WebSocket cannot parse Socket.IO Engine.IO protocol

step7.process: PTY output sent back to frontend
step7.evidence: No output in terminal, hangs waiting

technicalEvidence.protocolMismatchDetail: Socket.IO uses Engine.IO protocol with packet type prefixes (42 = message), raw WebSocket expects plain JSON

commonCauses: Assuming WebSocket and Socket.IO are interoperable
Implementing transport without application protocol consideration
